recommendations.title: From Beijing with Love
recommendations.overview: A Chinese secret agent travels to Hong Kong to reclaim a dinosaur fossil but experiences hilarious incidents because of his incompetence.

recommendations.title: The God of Cookery
recommendations.overview: The most renowned and feared chef in the world loses his title of God of Cookery because of his pompous attitude. Humbled, he sets out to reclaim his title.

recommendations.title: Flirting Scholar
recommendations.overview: A scholar in search of true love. Disguising himself as a houseboy, he indentures himself to a rich family in order to pursue the ravishing servant girl who has stolen his heart.

recommendations.title: Shaolin Soccer
recommendations.overview: A young Shaolin follower reunites with his discouraged brothers to form a soccer team using their martial art skills to their advantage.

recommendations.title: Forbidden City Cop
recommendations.overview: An imperial agent gets ridiculed for his various inventions, until his supportive wife encourages him to attend a conference, which's actually a trap to kill all the doctors serving the emperor, where his crazy inventions come in handy.

recommendations.title: Love on Delivery
recommendations.overview: Ho Kam-An is a lovestruck dim sum delivery boy who falls for a beautiful judo student. After being humiliated by her boyfriend, Ho Kam-An seeks the services of an aging master who teaches him a half-assed style of kung fu, "Karate Kid"-style.

recommendations.title: CJ7
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Drama, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A poor construction worker, who struggles to keep his son in private school, mistakes an orb he finds in a junkjard for a toy which proves to be much, much more once the young boy starts to play with it.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Hustle
recommendations.overview: It's the 1940s, and the notorious Axe Gang terrorizes Shanghai. Small-time criminals Sing and Bone hope to join, but they only manage to make lots of very dangerous enemies. Fortunately for them, kung fu masters and hidden strength can be found in un

recommendations.title: The Mermaid
recommendations.overview: When Xuan's real estate project threatens the home of mermaids, Shan is sent to stop him. When they fall in love, he is encouraged to cancel the project. However, he must save them from bigger danger.

recommendations.title: In the Mood for Love
recommendations.overview: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.
